description_long: This is a rectangular chest of drawers with a matte black exterior and two prominent brown drawers on the front. Each drawer features a round knob handle, also brown, for easy gripping and pulling. The top, sides, and back of the chest are solid black, giving it a modern and minimalistic appearance. The drawers appear to be made of wood or a wood-like material, contrasting with the darker body. The chest is compact and boxy, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, entryways, or storage rooms. There are no visible decorative features, locks, or branding on the exterior.
description: A compact, black chest of drawers with two brown drawers and round knob handles, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two brown drawers with round knob handles set in a matte black frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid black side panel with a slight glimpse of the drawer fronts.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted black surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid black panel and partial drawer visibility.
